about.seoDescription: Learn about Cosy Loops — handmade crochet creations lovingly crafted in the UK.
about.heading: About Cosy Loops
about.intro: We're a small, home-based crochet studio in the UK, making adorable handmade creations one stitch at a time.
about.storyText: Cosy Loops started from a love of crochet and a desire to share handmade joy with the world. Every item in our shop is carefully crocheted by hand using premium yarn, with attention to detail and a whole lot of love.
about.whatWeDoText: From cute amigurumi animals and bag charms to practical accessories like tote bags, scrunchies, and hanging planters — each piece is unique and made to last.
about.valueHandmade: Handmade with care — no mass production, ever
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your new favourite?

notFound.heading: Oops! This page unravelled.
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

shipping.seoDescription: Learn about our shipping options, delivery times, and return policy for handmade crochet items.
shipping.heading: Shipping & Returns
shipping.shippingText: We ship all orders via Royal Mail within the UK. Standard delivery takes 3-5 working days. Orders over £30 qualify for free shipping.
shipping.processingText: As all items are handmade, please allow 1-3 working days for your order to be prepared before dispatch.
shipping.returnsText: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in their original condition. Please email us to arrange a return.
shipping.damageText: If your item arrives damaged, please contact us within 48 hours with photos and we will arrange a replacement or full refund.

faq.seoDescription: Frequently asked questions about Cosy Loops handmade crochet products, shipping, and orders.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! Every single item is hand-crocheted by us using premium yarn. No machines, no mass production — just love and lots of stitches.
faq.a2: UK standard delivery takes 3-5 working days via Royal Mail. Please allow 1-3 additional days for us to prepare your handmade item.
faq.q3: Can I request a custom order?
faq.a3: We love custom requests! Please email us at hello@cosyloops.com with your idea and we will let you know if we can make it happen.
faq.a4: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unused items in original condition. Email us to arrange a return.
faq.a5: Currently we only ship within the UK. We hope to offer international shipping in the future!
faq.q6: How do I care for my crochet item?
faq.a6: We recommend gentle hand washing in cool water and laying flat to dry. Avoid machine washing as it may damage the stitches.

contact.seoDescription: Get in touch with Cosy Loops for questions about our handmade crochet products.
contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.intro: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about your order, want to request a custom item, or just want to say hello.
contact.socialText: Follow us on social media for behind-the-scenes peeks, new product announcements, and crochet inspiration.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seoDescription: Learn how Cosy Loops collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

sections.dataWeCollectBody: When you use our website, we may collect: your name, email address, phone number, shipping address (when you place an order); payment information (processed securely by Stripe — we never store your card details); browsing data and cookies (with your consent).
sections.howWeUseBody: We use your personal data to: process and deliver your orders; send order confirmation and shipping notification emails; improve our website and services; comply with legal obligations.
sections.dataSharingBody: We share your data with: Stripe (payment processing); Firebase/Google Cloud (authentication and database); AWS (email delivery and hosting); Cloudflare (image hosting). We never sell your data to third parties.
sections.dataRetentionBody: We retain your order data for 7 years for accounting and tax purposes. Account data is retained until you request deletion.
sections.yourRightsBody: Under UK GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data; correct inaccurate data; request deletion of your data; export your data; withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at {email}.
sections.cookiesBody: We use essential cookies for website functionality and optional analytics cookies (with your consent) to understand how visitors use our site.
sections.contactBody: For privacy-related enquiries, contact us at {email}.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.seoDescription: Read the terms and conditions for using Cosy Loops and purchasing our handmade crochet products.

sections.generalBody: These terms govern your use of the Cosy Loops website and your purchase of products from us. By using our website, you agree to these terms.
sections.productsBody: All products are handmade and may have slight variations in size, colour, and appearance. This is a characteristic of handmade items, not a defect. Product images are for illustration purposes and the actual item may differ slightly.
sections.pricingBody: All prices are shown in GBP and include VAT where applicable. We accept payment via Stripe (credit/debit cards). Payment is taken at the time of purchase.
sections.ordersBody: By placing an order, you are making an offer to purchase. We will confirm your order via email. We reserve the right to cancel any order if the product is unavailable or there is a pricing error.
sections.shippingBody: We ship within the UK via Royal Mail. Standard delivery takes 3-5 working days. Please allow 1-3 additional working days for handmade preparation. Orders over £50 qualify for free shipping.
sections.returnsBody: You have 14 days from receipt to return items under the UK Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013. Items must be unused and in original condition. See our Returns Policy for full details.
sections.liabilityBody: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Cosy Loops shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our website or products.
sections.privacyBody: Your personal data is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. By using our website, you consent to our data practices as described therein.
sections.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
sections.contactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us at {email}.

returns.title: Returns Policy
returns.seoDescription: Our returns and refund policy. 14-day cooling-off period for all UK orders.

sections.coolingOffBody: Under the UK Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013, you have the right to cancel your order within 14 days of receiving your item(s), without giving any reason.
sections.eligibilityBody: To be eligible for a return, items must be unused, unwashed, and in the same condition as received. Items must be returned in their original packaging where possible.
sections.processBody: To initiate a return, please email us at {email} within 14 days of receiving your order. We will provide you with return instructions and a reference number.
sections.refundsBody: Once we receive and inspect your returned item, we will process your refund within 14 days. Refunds will be issued to your original payment method via Stripe.
sections.exceptionsBody: Custom or personalised items cannot be returned unless they are faulty or not as described. Items that have been used, washed, or altered are not eligible for return.
sections.shippingCostsBody: You are responsible for the cost of return shipping unless the item is faulty or not as described. We recommend using a tracked delivery service.
sections.contactBody: For any returns enquiries, please contact us at {email}. We aim to respond within 24-48 hours.
